name: ai-maestro-janitor
description: Session-scoped janitor: reconciles PRs, worktrees, TRDD drift, task/PR mismatch; handles rate-limit auto-resume and prompt-cache keep-alive via Monitors + hooks. No external daemons.

github_repo.description: GitHub repo slug for PR reconciliation (owner/repo). Defaults to the origin remote when unset.

trdd_path.description: Relative path from project root to the TRDD directory. Default: design/tasks/

pr_reconciler_interval.description: Seconds between PR reconciliation passes. Default: 900 (15 min).

worktree_janitor_interval.description: Seconds between worktree scans. Default: 900 (15 min).

trdd_drift_interval.description: Seconds between TRDD drift checks. Default: 3600 (1 h).

trdd_reminder_interval.description: Seconds between in-progress TRDD reminders. Default: 14400 (4 h).

task_pr_mismatch_interval.description: Seconds between task/PR cross-checks. Default: 1800 (30 min).

rate_limit_retry_interval.description: Seconds between rate-limit resume prompts. Default: 120 (2 min).

cache_keepalive_threshold.description: Idle seconds before emitting a cache keep-alive. Default: 270 (4m30s) for the 5-min cache; raise to 3600 for the 1-h cache.

trdd_staleness_days.description: Days a TRDD can sit 'In progress' before it counts as drift. Default: 14.

stale_pr_days.description: Days an open PR can sit without new commits before it counts as stale. Default: 14.
